relationships.context: Vrijen proposed the structure for organizing knowledge.
Meetings are part of the knowledge management approach.
Knowledge is a primary focus within the proposed structure.
System documents are used for structuring and reviewing processes.
Tools are part of the knowledge system for practical applications.
